name: InfoWindow
description: Glassmorphic info panel with retro taskbar, tab navigation, and scrollable content area

title.description: Window title displayed in the taskbar with scramble text effect

tabs.description: Navigation tabs for the right-side icon strip

glowColor.description: CSS color for active glow effect

onTabChange.description: Callback when a tab is selected

onClose.description: Callback when window is closed (via button or Escape key)

children.description: Content to render in the scrollable area

footerLeft.description: Elements rendered on the left side of the footer taskbar

footerRight.description: Primary CTA element rendered on the right side of the footer

features.scrambleTitle: Title animates with scramble text effect on mount
features.tabNavigation: Vertical icon strip with glow effect and comet tail animation
features.swipeSupport: Touch swipe to navigate between tabs
features.copyLink: Copy current panel URL to clipboard
features.scrollHiding: Tab strip hides during scroll on mobile

examples.name: Basic info window
examples.code: Your content here

examples.name: With footer
examples.code:
<InfoWindow
  title="PANEL.exe"
  activeId="main"
  tabs={tabs}
  onTabChange={setTab}
  onClose={close}
  footerLeft={<SocialLinks />}
  footerRight={<Button>Register</Button>}
>
  <Content />
</InfoWindow>
